name: hero-section
purpose: nimiq.com home hero: deep purple radial-gradient sky with floating translucent hexagons, white 800-weight 'Universal Money for Independent Individuals' headline, lavender subtitle, light-blue 'Create Wallet ↗' pill, WORKS WITH partner row, and a dotted-globe white arc cresting at the bottom.

props.name: subtitle
props.default: In a centralized world, Nimiq gives independence back to you.

notes: MARKETING component, screenshot-referenced (no upstream source). Calibrated against references/screenshots/nimiq-com/home-hero-section.png, home-hero-cta-button.png and home-desktop-full.png per references/supporting-elements-brief-2026-06-11.md item 7. Dotted globe is generated (SVG dot pattern over rough continent blobs clipped to a huge white circle) — dot/continent positions are illustrative, not geographic; the REAL 977x362 dotted world map is now vendored at references/assets/nimiq-com/home-hero/map.svg (484KB) if a geographic version is ever wanted. Partner row uses the REAL white nimiq.com logos inlined from references/assets/nimiq-com/prismic/ (cryptopayment-link-logo-white.svg 220x32, btc-lightning-logo-white.svg 43x31, naka-logo-white.svg 84x20, polygon-logo.svg 32x32); NAKA svg ids prefixed nq-hs-naka-*. Sky stays a pixel-verified CSS gradient approximation — the real hero sky asset ('Nimiq Gods Rays Background', rendered blur-60 brightness-80 on nimiq.com) is vendored at references/assets/nimiq-com/gods-light.webp (1600x900, 30KB) as an alternative. Modern px-based styling with Mulish; no legacy framework dependency. SVG ids prefixed nq-hs- to stay collision-safe when embedded with other snippets.
